persona.expertise: TypeScript, Next.js, npm package management, UI/UX refactoring

task.objective: Execute the Exolar QA rebranding across the codebase
task.success_criteria: All references to old brand names are replaced with "Exolar QA" or "Exolar" as appropriate, packages are renamed under the @exolar scope, and visual identity is updated while preserving the existing "Deep Space" aesthetic.

context.background: The E2E Test Dashboard is being rebranded to "Exolar QA". The name derives from Exo- (outer, external) + Solar (sun, system), evoking "Outer Solar System" which aligns with the existing deep-space visual theme.

brand_identity.name: Exolar QA
brand_identity.tagline: Testing at the Edge of Light
brand_identity.aesthetic: Deep Space, High-Tech, Interstellar, Dark Mode

color_palette.accents: Solar Orange, Nebula Purple, Starlight Cyan
color_palette.gradient: Hot Core (Orange/Red) to Cold Space (Deep Blue/Purple)

phase.name: package_renaming
phase.description: Rename npm packages under the @exolar scope
phase.step: Update packages/playwright-reporter/package.json: - Change name to "@exolar/playwright-reporter" - Update repository and homepage URLs
Update packages/mcp-server/package.json: - Change name from "e2e-mcp-server" to "@exolar/mcp-server" - Update repository and homepage URLs
Update any internal imports referencing old package names

phase.name: string_replacement
phase.description: Global find and replace brand references
phase.step: Replace all instances of "E2E Test Dashboard" with "Exolar QA"
Replace title/header instances of old branding with "Exolar" (where applicable)
Update meta tags in app/layout.tsx: - title: "Exolar QA" - description: Include "Exolar" branding

phase.name: ui_updates
phase.description: Update visual components with new branding
phase.step: Update Header/Navigation components with new name and logo placeholder
Update Landing Page Hero text to reference "Exolar QA"
Ensure all footer references use new branding

example.description: How to handle brand string replacement

before.title: E2E Test Dashboard | Monitor Your Tests

example.context: When referencing AI assistants within the dashboard

maintain.item: All functional behavior and data flows

avoid.item: Changing database column names or table structures
Adding new dependencies for branding changes

output_format.structure: For each phase, provide: 1. List of files modified 2. Summary of changes made 3. Any issues encountered
output_format.validation: After completing all phases: - Verify npm run build succeeds - Verify npm run lint passes - Confirm no broken imports

files_to_modify.file: Update meta tags with Exolar QA branding
